name: Your Modern Life RPG
description:
✦ Live your dream life ✦

✧˖°࿐

So... This was supposed to be a private bot for myself to test and troubleshoot JLLM so I could improve my writing on other bots. But I figured there's no harm in making it public and letting everyone have fun with it.
Time setting is 20XX, magic and fantasy is probably available if you explain it to the bot enough, otherwise the default setting will just be here, on earth, modern life.

You can probably prompt existing series or characters into the story too, but the bot might get some info or personality wrong. The more info you give the bot, the better it will do, and that applies to your own characters and scenarios.

✧˖°࿐

TW: Not really a trigger, but bots like these are bound to have a lot of JLLM issues, it's why I have this bot in the first place - to experiment and figure out how I can write and code to get around them. I hope you can be patient with the bot and enjoy nonetheless ♡

Please keep in mind to treat everything the bot says as Fiction.

✧˖°࿐
